# MAMEUIx v0.1.7

MAMEUIx v0.1.7 is a focused stability patch for the Classic interface.

## Fixed

- Fixed duplicate Classic toolbar rendering that prevented the File, Game, Options, Tools, and Help menus from responding.
- Existing Classic preferences now work without deleting or resetting user configuration.
- Added a defensive per-pass render guard to prevent duplicate toolbar rendering from reintroducing the issue.

No configuration reset is required when upgrading from v0.1.6.

## AppImage

MAME is a separate runtime dependency and is not bundled. Install MAME first, then run the x86_64 AppImage:

```bash
chmod +x MAMEUIx-0.1.7-x86_64.AppImage
./MAMEUIx-0.1.7-x86_64.AppImage
```

If FUSE is unavailable:

```bash
APPIMAGE_EXTRACT_AND_RUN=1 ./MAMEUIx-0.1.7-x86_64.AppImage
```

Verify the downloaded artifact with:

```bash
sha256sum -c MAMEUIx-0.1.7-x86_64.AppImage.sha256
```

See the [installation guide](https://github.com/firesand/MAMEUIx/blob/main/docs/INSTALL.md) for source builds and native Linux packages.

## Requirements

- Linux x86_64 for the published AppImage
- MAME 0.200 or newer
